UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2021 MOTION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT - CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2021 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH FURTHER INFORMATION IN SUPPORT OF ITS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT. CHRISTINE M. MASTROMONACO, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION. ROBERT JOHNSON, DIRECTOR OF LEGAL OPERATIONS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KENNETH TSE. NO LATER THAN 2/16/2021, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A BRIEF IN SUPPORT THE REQUESTED DAMAGE AMOUNT. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT(S) WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
